content:
All 5 files have been created successfully:

1. **D:\AI-Business\skills\SKILL_comfyui_generation.md** — ComfyUI API skill covering startup, API reference (POST /prompt, GET /history, WebSocket monitoring), workflow loading/modification, Python code for queueing/monitoring/downloading, coloring book example (SDXL + ColoringBook.Redmond LoRA), wall art example (Flux), error handling table with retry pattern, and VRAM management for RTX 5070 12GB.

2. **D:\AI-Business\skills\SKILL_pdf_assembly.md** — PDF assembly skill covering the pdf_assembler.py CLI with all flags (--input-dir, --output, --title, --niche, --page-size, --dpi, --margins, --include-cover, --bleed, --sort, --even-pages), full KDP specs table (8.5x11", 300DPI, margins, bleed, page count, cover dimensions, <650MB), pixel dimension reference, Python verification function, error handling, and example commands.

3. **D:\AI-Business\skills\SKILL_listing_writer.md** — Listing writer skill covering Ollama API (POST to 127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate, qwen2.5:14b), KDP description template with system prompt and example function, Etsy listing template (140 char title, sectioned description, 13 tags ≤20 chars), SEO optimization guidelines (keyword strategy, placement rules), quality validation function (AI-phrase detection, CTA check, platform-specific limits), retry logic with validation re-checks, and full end-to-end example.

4. **D:\AI-Business\skills\SKILL_niche_research.md** — Niche research skill covering manual 5-step research process, validation criteria table (BSR<100K, <200 reviews, ≥$7.99, 3+ books BSR<50K, no trademark, content feasibility), scoring formula (Demand 40%, Competition 30%, Price 15%, Trend 15%) with worked example, niches.json database schema with all fields and status values, seasonal calendar table (all 12 months), evergreen niches table with BSR ranges, and wall art niche considerations for Etsy.

5. **D:\AI-Business\logs\README.md** — Logging system documentation covering 5 log files (orchestrator, comfyui_client, pdf_assembler, listing_writer, diagnostics), format specification, severity levels table, reading logs with PowerShell/findstr/grep commands, diagnosing common issues (OOM, connection refused, timeouts, validation failures, PDF errors), rotation policy (daily, 30-day retention, gzip after 7 days), and alerting triggers with monitoring script.

toolCall.name: send_message
